articles.author: Auzinea Bacon, Mohammed Tawfeeq, Maureen Chowdhury, Issy Ronald, Aileen Graef, Matt Meyer, Adam Pourahmadi, Catherine Nicholls, Tim Lister, Sophie Tanno, Billy Stockwell, Jomana Karadsheh, Ibrahim Dahman, Chris Lau, Logan Schiciano, Aleena Fayaz
articles.title: Live updates: Iran war news; US troop deaths raise fears of a wider war as Iran hit by new strikes - CNN
articles.description: An American service member was killed in Iraq on Saturday, the US military said a day after announcing two troops died in an Iranian attack in Jordan. Follow live updates.
articles.content: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Sunday that about two-thirds of pre-conflict traffic, or about 14 million barrels a day, is moving through the Strait of Hormuz despite renewed fighting between … [+1922 chars]
